message:
fix: require root for system-scope systemd with clear guidance

Add an early root check in run_install() when --systemd is used without
--user. Instead of letting the install proceed through ballast provisioning
only to fail with an opaque permission error during unit file creation,
this immediately returns a clear error message suggesting either sudo or
the --user flag for user-scope installation.

Fixes #3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
